items.title: Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince says AI won't replace builders or sellers, but it will affect middle managers, operations jobs, and other "measuring" positions (Matthew Prince/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_original: Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince says AI won't replace builders or sellers, but it will affect middle managers, operations jobs, and other "measuring" positions (Matthew Prince/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_en: Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince says AI won't replace builders or sellers, but it will affect middle managers, operations jobs, and other "measuring" positions (Matthew Prince/Wall Street Journal)
items.title_zh: Cloudflare 首席执行官马修·普林斯 (Matthew Prince) 表示，人工智能不会取代建筑商或卖家，但它将影响中层管理人员、运营工作和其他“衡量”职位（马修·普林斯/华尔街日报）

items.title: Samsung's bonus deal is fueling employee resentment over a 100x payout gap between memory division staff and those making smartphones, TVs, and home appliances (Yoolim Lee/Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Samsung's bonus deal is fueling employee resentment over a 100x payout gap between memory division staff and those making smartphones, TVs, and home appliances (Yoolim Lee/Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Samsung's bonus deal is fueling employee resentment over a 100x payout gap between memory division staff and those making smartphones, TVs, and home appliances (Yoolim Lee/Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 三星的奖金协议加剧了员工的不满，因为内存部门员工与智能手机、电视和家用电器制造部门员工之间的薪酬差距达 100 倍（Yoolim Lee/彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 三星的奖金协议加剧了员工的不满，因为内存部门员工与智能手机、电视和家用电器制造部门员工之间的薪酬差距达 100 倍（Yoolim Lee/彭博社） / Samsung's bonus deal is fueling employee resentment over a 100x payout gap between memory division staff and those making smartphones, TVs, and home appliances (Yoolim Lee/Bloomberg)

items.title: Filing: Zoom's stake in Anthropic is worth ~$1.27B based on a February round which valued Anthropic at $380B; Zoom invested an additional $46M in recent months (Brody Ford/Bloomberg)
